name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #3
description: Florentine Brainrot #3 is a toxic emerald tabloid single-panel relic built around DaVinci and Bootleg Museum Giftshop. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Fuoco, used here as the witness card. The Fuoco motif turns the whole panel into a little court exhibit. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks. Serial DAVI-3 carries codon marker GATGCTGTAATAAACTGTATT; Gematria marks CODEX at Σ 306.

attributes.value: a hand-drawn liquidity puddle reflecting the Duomo
